lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: What brings you here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: I'm a security guard. Long ago I used to wander the world, teaching people how to protect themselves from security threats, and giving out books of advice.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: I've retired now. They tell me there's some flashy poser in a vampyre outfit doing my old job now, and even giving out prizes to people he thinks are worthy!

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: In my day, people didn't need prizes for taking security seriously! Honestly, I don't know what's the matter with young people these days...

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: ... but if fear of XP waste is what people need to make them protect themselves properly, I suppose that's how it'll have to be.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: It's nice to meet someone who takes this stuff seriously! Alright, I'll have a look over your account...

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Firstly, make sure you've upgraded to a Jagex Account to get the latest protection. Visit the RuneScape website and log in to update your Account settings.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Jagex Accounts protect you via two-factor authentication - anyone trying to steal your Jagex Account would need get past that second check too, rather than just learning your password.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: For additional protection, you can use a mobile authenticator and backup codes too.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Make sure you keep your email account properly secure too, though - good email providers will offer two- factor authentication options.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Well, you're off to a good start - I see you have a Jagex Account, so you should have the latest protection.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Jagex Accounts protect you via two-factor authentication - anyone trying to steal your Jagex Account would need get past that second check too, rather than just learning your password.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: For additional protection, you can use a mobile authenticator and backup codes too.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Make sure you keep your email account properly secure too, though - good email providers will offer two- factor authentication options.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Aside from that, I see you don't have a Bank PIN. Next time you visit a bank, talk to a banker and ask to check your PIN settings.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Aside from that, I see you have a Bank PIN.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Here's a security book for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be off now.

lines.speaker: Security Guard
lines.text: Stay safe!
